description_long: This restaurant object is shaped like a large, leafy green cabbage with a creamy, textured filling on top, resembling a gourmet dish presented on a round, dark ceramic plate. The outer layers are composed of overlapping, pale green leaves, some of which are slightly curled and uneven, giving a natural, organic appearance. The central portion features a thick, creamy sauce with visible chunks, possibly representing pieces of bread or protein, and is lightly browned in places. The plate itself is dark gray with a slightly rough, matte finish and a shallow, wide rim. The overall presentation is rustic and artisanal, with a focus on natural textures and colors. There are no visible architectural or structural elements typical of a building.
description: A rustic, cabbage-shaped restaurant object with creamy filling, presented on a dark ceramic plate. The design emphasizes natural textures and earthy colors.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cabbage's leafy layers and the creamy, chunky filling most prominently, with the plate's rim visible all around.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the uneven, curled leaves and a more pronounced portion of the creamy filling spilling over the edge.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a smoother, less detailed side of the cabbage, with the filling mostly covered by the outer leaves.
description_view_3: This view displays a large, detached leaf extending from the cabbage, with the filling partially visible and the plate's surface more exposed.
attribute_facade_design: The exterior is designed to resemble a natural cabbage, with layered, textured green leaves and a creamy, rustic filling on top. The base is a simple, dark ceramic plate with a slightly rough, matte finish, giving an artisanal and organic impression. There are no visible architectural features, ornamentation, or structural elements typical of a restaurant building.
